scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use for LlamaFactory repository workflows: training configs, dataset/template preparation, model loading/export, inference/API/Web UI operations, and experimental USE_V1 flows.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `llama-factory` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: data and templates, inference and serving, model loading and export, training and configs, v1 experimental, and webui and ops.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `llama-factory` when the request names `llama-factory`, centers on Use for LlamaFactory repository workflows: training configs, dataset/template preparation, model loading/export, inference/API/Web UI operations, and experimental USE_V1 flows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to data and templates, inference and serving, model loading and export, or training and configs when those focused workflows match.
